description_long: This is a rustic, oval-shaped loaf of bread with a thick, golden-brown crust that appears slightly uneven and textured. The top surface is dotted with a light dusting of flour and scattered oat flakes, giving it a hearty, artisanal appearance. The crust is deeply browned in some areas, with visible cracks and a rough, baked finish. One side of the loaf is cut, revealing a dense, airy crumb with visible seeds or grains embedded throughout the interior. The bread's overall form is slightly domed, with rounded edges and a natural, hand-formed look. The coloration transitions from a deep brown on the crust to a creamy beige in the interior crumb.
description: A rustic, oval loaf of bread with a thick, golden-brown crust, flour dusting, and a dense, seeded interior. The surface is rough and artisanal, with visible oat flakes and a cut side showing the crumb.
description_view_0: The top and front of the loaf are visible, showing a golden-brown, flour-dusted crust with oat flakes and a slightly domed shape.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the deep brown, rough crust and the loaf's rounded, uneven form with visible cracks.
description_view_2: The cut side of the bread is shown, revealing a dense, airy crumb with seeds or grains and a creamy beige interior.
description_view_3: Another side view, emphasizing the thick, textured crust with oat flakes and a more pronounced browning along the edge.
materials: bread (wheat flour, water, yeast, seeds, oats)
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust is thick and rustic, with a rough, uneven texture and scattered oat flakes on top. There is a light dusting of flour and some natural cracking, giving it an artisanal, hand-baked appearance.
